name: @pryzm/plugin-slab
description: PRYZM 2 — Slab plugin (S12-T2). Headless half: Store<SlabData>, typed errors, 8 handlers (CreateSlab / DeleteSlab / MoveSlab / SetSlabType / AddSlabHole / RemoveSlabHole / SetSlabBaseOffset / SetSlabThickness). Producer (packages/geometry-kernel/src/producers/slab.ts) emits a BufferGeometryDescriptor with top + bottom + side material slots. Slab → wall cascade (boundary edits propagate to walls touching the perimeter) lives in plugins/cross/slab-wall.ts. Committer / tool live under src/committer/.
